data.title: About Ferro
data.seo_description: A pre-alpha Rust CMS that ships a single binary, isolates plugins in WASM, and serves zero-JS HTML by default.

blocks.text: Ferro is a CMS written end-to-end in Rust. Server, admin UI, and plugin host all share one toolchain and one type system.
Existing CMS platforms force a tradeoff between flexibility and operational burden. Ferro removes the tradeoff by collapsing the stack into one binary.
Pre-alpha. Use in side projects to find rough edges, not in production.
